citations.narrative:
In the back storage room there was a moderate accumulation of rodent droppings along the floor next to the back walls
with a heavier accumulation covering an approximately 1.5 sq. ft. corner area. This back room is used to store animal
food, bedding and other animal supplies. Pests and vermin may contaminate food and supplies as well as harbor and
spread diseases. A safe and effective pest control program must be established and maintained to protect the health and
well-being of the animals.
Correct by 02/27/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

3.131(d) 
   
Sanitation. 
In the back storage room there was a moderate accumulation of rodent droppings along the floor next to the back walls 
with a heavier accumulation covering an approximately 1.5 sq. ft. corner area. This back room is used to store animal 
food, bedding and other animal supplies. Pests and vermin may contaminate food and supplies as well as harbor and 
spread diseases. A safe and effective pest control program must be established and maintained to protect the health and 
well-being of the animals. 
 
Correct by 02/27/2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
